x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR skills and competency data enables Now Assist to match HR case complexity to agent expertise. Without skills data, Now Assist cannot optimize agent assignment based on capability matching.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Populate HR agent skills and competency profiles via sn_hr_core_skill_list.do. Assign skills to HR service desk agents. Target: 10+ active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD uses skill matching for AI-optimized case assignment.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[HR skills and competency data enables Now Assist to match HR case complexity to agent expertise. Without skills data, Now Assist cannot optimize agent assignment based on capability matching.]]></ai_justification><check_name>HR Skills and Competency Data</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmn_skill");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmn_skill not found", finding: "Skills table (cmn_skill) is not available. Verify the Skills plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("cmn_skill");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active skill definitions";
    if (count >= 10) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD can perform competency-matched AI case assignment." };
    } else if (count >= 3) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active skill definitions (target: 10+). Now Assist HRSD skill-based AI assignment will have limited matching coverage." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Fewer than 3 active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD AI case assignment defaults to simple routing without skills data — competency-matched assignment is unavailable." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>HRSD</module><number>CHK0000405</number><order>130</order><remediation_guidance>Populate HR agent skills and competency profiles via sn_hr_core_skill_list.do. Assign skills to HR service desk agents. Target: 10+ active skill definitions. Now Assist HRSD uses skill matching for AI-optimized case assignment.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>HR Skills and Competency Data</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_4bf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c5b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
